title: lastrea regis
intro: Lastrea regis, also known as the Royal Lady Fern or Lastrea regis, is a species of fern that belongs to the family Athyriaceae. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Lastrea regis include reducing inflammation, improving respiratory health, and treating various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Lastrea regis can be made by infusing the dried fronds in hot water to create a tea, or by combining the plant with other herbs to create a salve or ointment for topical use.
